PeriodRule: Period Start date should be less then period End date.
User can delete period from last to second.
User can't modify the period of existing plan.
User can entered plan description. Default plan description will be system generated plan name.
User can select price effective date . Default price effective date will be yesterday date.
Period dates begins at 12:00:00 on first day of period, and ends at 23:59:59 on the last day of period
